sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_fuzzy (id UInt32, description String);
INSERT INTO test_fuzzy VALUES (1, 'Hello World'), (2, 'Hello W0rld'), (3, 'Helo Wld');
SELECT id FROM test_fuzzy WHERE multiFuzzyMatchAny(description, 1, ['Hello', 'Hllo', 'Worl']) = 1;
UPDATE test_fuzzy SET description = 'Goodbye World' WHERE multiFuzzyMatchAny(description, 2, ['Goodbey', 'Goddbye']) = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_fuzzy WHERE multiFuzzyMatchAny(description, 1, ['foo', 'bar', 'baz']) = 1;
